attack1_contamination.finding: 66.4% of AP+ events are detection not prediction
attack1_contamination.implication: AP task conflates detection with prediction

attack2_metric.evidence: Random baseline F1-tol=68.1% BEATS A2P's 67.55%; Brier Skill=-0.117
attack2_metric.implication: F1-tol metric is uninterpretable and gameable

attack3_evaluation.finding: Context variance (detection) achieves AUROC=0.401 matching trained models
attack3_evaluation.evidence: A2P AUROC=0.528 barely exceeds trivial detection AUROC
attack3_evaluation.implication: Evaluation protocol does not distinguish detection from prediction

attack4_dataset.finding: SMD oracle AUROC=0.346 (below random) due to 38-channel noise
attack4_dataset.evidence: Top-5 channels oracle=0.704; adding 33 channels degrades to below random
attack4_dataset.implication: SMD dataset invalid for AP evaluation without channel selection

attack5_baseline.finding: Untrained LR (variance features) AUROC=0.636 vs A2P=0.528 (+0.108)
attack5_baseline.implication: A2P provides no benefit over trivial feature engineering
